# Illuminati AI

> Premium AI agents and automation agency in India. We build custom AI agents, agentic systems, and AI infrastructure for Indian SMBs and enterprises.

## About

Illuminati AI is a Mumbai-based AI engineering firm founded by Monish Shah in 2026, evolving from Illuminati Media (established 2018). We specialize in:

- **Custom AI Agents** — Bespoke single-purpose agents for specific business functions
- **Agentic Systems & Workflows** — Multi-agent orchestration for end-to-end automation
- **AI Infrastructure Engineering** — Private AI brains, retrieval pipelines, vector databases
- **OpenClaw Setup** — Specialised framework deployment for production agentic capability
- **AI Strategy & Audit** — Diagnostic engagements for AI transformation roadmaps
- **Website Engineering** — Premium AI-native websites with embedded agents

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://illuminatiai.tech/): Company overview and value proposition
- [Services](https://illuminatiai.tech/services.html): Six tiers of AI services with pricing
- [Products](https://illuminatiai.tech/products.html): Creator OS and Content Automation Suite (coming soon)
- [How It Works](https://illuminatiai.tech/how-it-works.html): 3-phase implementation process
- [About](https://illuminatiai.tech/about.html): Company history and founder bio
- [FAQ](https://illuminatiai.tech/faq.html): Common questions about AI agents and our services
- [Contact](https://illuminatiai.tech/contact.html): Get in touch and request quotes

## Service Pricing

All prices in Indian Rupees (INR), exclusive of GST:

- Custom AI Agents: Starting from ₹50,000
- AI Strategy & Audit: Starting from ₹50,000
- OpenClaw Setup: Starting from ₹1,00,000
- Customised Agentic Systems & Workflows: Starting from ₹1,00,000
- AI Infrastructure Engineering: Starting from ₹1,50,000
- Website Engineering: Starting from ₹2,00,000

## Market Position

Founded in 2026, Illuminati AI operates in the Indian AI agents market, which Grand View Research projects will grow at 57.4% CAGR to US$15.2B by 2033. Salesforce research indicates 78% of Indian SMBs are already experimenting with AI, making this an ideal time for businesses to invest in custom AI agents.
